name: Burst: 4 tasks back-to-back, all arrive
tasks_sent: What is the weather like in Pittsburgh today?

responses: Gathering your Pittsburgh weather, pizza, shopping, and home service details now.

🌤️ Today's Weather
Expect a mix of clouds and sun with a high of 77°F. It's 73°F right now, but clouds will thicken tonight with a 75% chance of light rain starting after sunset.

🍕 Top Pizza Spots
• Driftwood Oven: 4.7★ Sourdough pies in Lawrenceville (Closes 9 PM)
• Pizza Lupo: 4.8★ Top-rated delivery and takeout (Closes 9 PM)
• La Vera Brooklyn Pizzeria: 4.7★ Authentic Brooklyn style (Closes 9 PM)

🎯 Target Hours
Most locations, including Penn Ave and McKnight Rd, are open until 10 PM or 11 PM tonight. The Smithfield St downtown location closes earlier at 7 PM.

🔧 Recommended Plumber
Revelation Plumbing (4.9★) is highly recommended for stellar work and is available 24/7. You can reach them at (412) 618-1165.
reason: Asmi successfully provided accurate and relevant information for all four tasks within a single thread without dropping any requests.
matched_responses: [3] Weather info, [4] Pizza spots, [5] Target hours, [6] Plumber details.
